cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
First you need a fresh winetricks:

sudo winetricks --self-update


Then you need a fresh protontricks:

wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sirmentio/protontricks/master/protontricks && chmod +x protontricks

sudo mv protontricks /usr/bin/protontricks


Then you need set "windows xp" mode to profile:

protontricks 21010 winxp


Then install "dotnet20":

protontricks 21010 dotnet20


After that game runs nice. Performance is not very good.
title: Watchmen: The End is Nigh
